    Food.update(GamePanel gp)
    Updates the food item's state.
    Constructors in ca.sfu.cmpt276.group8 with parameters of type GamePanel
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    Drawscreen(GamePanel gamePanel)
    Constructs a DrawScreen for the given GamePanel.
     
    EntitySpawner(GamePanel gp)
    Constructs an EntitySpawner and initializes it with a reference to the GamePanel.
     
    GameManager(GamePanel gamePanel)
    Constructs a GameUpdateManager for the given GamePanel.
     
    Pathfinder(GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Pathfinder and initializes the grid of nodes to match the map size.
     
    Player(Position startPos, int maxHealth, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a specified starting position and maximum health.
     
    Player(Position startPos, GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a Player object with a default maximum health of 6.
     
    TileManager(GamePanel gp)
    Constructs a TileManager and initializes the tile array and the map array.
     
    Zombie(GamePanel a, Position startPos)
    Constructs a Zombie object.
